texto: Revenge writing is a female genre. Men who have been left by women or made cuckolds by rivals either lick their wounds in humiliated silence or start the Trojan Wars. Having no other power or public voice, the betrayed woman reaches for her pen.
explicacao: Citação de Frances Wilson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Revenge writing is a female genre. Men who have been left by women or made cuckolds by rivals eit…” articula reflexao, betrayal, revenge em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e revenge.
